# Issue #4: Implement Minimal Play Controls

## Objective
Reduce playback controls to a single, centered play/pause button with clear visual feedback.

## Requirements
1. Single play/pause toggle button
2. Remove stop button
3. Center button below grid
4. Clear visual feedback on state
5. Adequate touch target size
6. No animations except state change

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Single button implementation complete
- [ ] Clear play/pause state indication
- [ ] Proper touch target size (minimum 48dp)
- [ ] Smooth state transitions
- [ ] No unnecessary controls
- [ ] Proper alignment with grid
- [ ] Works well with timer display

## Dependencies
- Issue #1 (Grid Layout) should be completed first
- Issue #2 (Volume Removal) should be completed

## Testing Guidelines
1. Test play/pause functionality
2. Verify touch target size
3. Check state visual feedback
4. Test with screen readers
5. Verify proper alignment
